pattern: Check whether an even-length array can be split into two halves each with distinct elements — equivalently, no element appears more than twice.
hints: Count the frequency of each element; if any element appears three or more times, it is impossible to split the array without repeats in one half.
The maximum frequency allowed for any value is 2 — one copy in each half.
Check every element's count using a Counter or frequency map; return false as soon as any count exceeds 2.

edge_inputs.description: large array with one triple repeat
two elements each appearing twice — valid
one value appears four times — each half still needs 2 copies (not distinct)

stress.description: random even-length arrays with values in [1, 10] to exercise frequent repeats
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = size if size % 2 == 0 else size - 1
    nums = [rng.randint(1, 10) for _ in range(n)]
    return [nums]
